title: Accepted Risk Vocabulary
description: Shared vocabulary for accepted risk counts across release authority artifacts. These field names must be used consistently so that family-level, instance-level, gate-level, and lane-blocking counts are not conflated.

accepted_risk_family_count.description: Canonical count of distinct accepted risk families.

accepted_risk_instance_count.description: Canonical count of accepted risk instances (may equal family_count when each family has one instance).

accepted_risk_count.description: Canonical count of accepted risk instances in the release decision snapshot; excludes gate attention that is not an accepted risk.

gate_attention_count.description: Count of release dashboard gates in attention state, independent of whether the attention came from an accepted risk.

operator_accepted_risk_family_count.description: Count of distinct accepted risk families that are present only because an operator accepted the risk.

clean_lane_blocking_accepted_risk_family.description: Count of operator-accepted risk families that still block the clean release lane.

clean_lane_blocking_family_count.description: Count of accepted risk families that block the clean release lane.

learning_claim_blocking_family_count.description: Count of accepted risk families that block machine learning improvement claims without necessarily blocking source clean release.

advisory_lifecycle_family_count.description: Count of accepted risk families that represent advisory lifecycle backlog rather than clean-lane release blockers.

release_blocking_risk_family_count.description: Count of distinct accepted risk families whose clean_lane_effect blocks the clean release lane.

conditional_operator_review_risk_family_.description: Count of distinct accepted risk families whose conditional_lane_effect requires operator review.

learning_claim_blocking_risk_family_coun.description: Count of distinct accepted risk families whose learning_lane_effect blocks machine learning improvement claims.

advisory_lifecycle_risk_family_count.description: Count of distinct accepted risk families whose advisory_lifecycle_effect is review_backlog.

advisory_risk_family_count.description: Count of distinct accepted risk families that are advisory-only and do not block the clean release lane.
